artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Universite de Lille subdomain PDF titled as a good-practices charter for generative AI in pedagogical work; the text says Universite de Lille commits to ethical, responsible, pedagogical use of IAG and sets integrity, transparency, data-protection, prohibited-use, and teaching-integration guidance.

artifacts.summary: Official Universite de Lille sources were found for generative-AI teaching and academic-work guidance: a 2025 SIAG charter PDF and an official EDSMRE page describing and linking that charter. Generic home-page and research-profile results were rejected for policy claims.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des IAG dans les travaux pédagogiques

artifacts.claimText: Universite de Lille has an official 2025 charter of good practices for generative AI systems in pedagogical work; an official university page says the charter was finalized in March 2025 and aims to frame SIAG uses responsibly and transparently.

citation.citationTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des IAG dans les travaux pédagogiques
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Universite de Lille's SIAG charter says any use of generative AI systems in academic work should be clearly indicated, including how, to what extent, and for what objectives AI was used.

citation.citationTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Universite de Lille's SIAG charter advises users not to transmit sensitive documents or personal data to externally hosted generative AI systems and to check confidentiality policies and GDPR compliance.

citation.citationTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Universite de Lille's SIAG charter says presenting content generated by generative AI systems as one's own production is prohibited and that using AI to paraphrase others' content is considered a form of plagiarism.

citation.citationTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Universite de Lille's SIAG charter says teachers should specify SIAG-use instructions in their courses, inform students how SIAG use is or is not integrated into learning situations and assessments, and cannot require students to use SIAG tools that need personal data or payment.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des IAG dans les travaux pédagogiques
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Cette charte vise à encadrer les usages des SIAG dans un esprit de responsabilité, de transparence et de respects des valeurs universitaires, tout en encourageant un apprentissage enrichi et innovant. Face à l’essor rapide des outils d’intelligence artificielle générative, l’université de Lille a choisi d’accompagner les usages plutôt que de les restreindre.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The official page says the charter frames SIAG uses responsibly and transparently, and that Universite de Lille chose to support uses rather than restrict them.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Protection des données : Ne pas transmettre de documents sensibles ou des données personnelles à des SIAG hébergés en externe. S’assurer des politiques de confidentialité des outils utilisés avant de les intégrer dans un projet universitaire. S’assurer du respect du Règlement Général de Protection des Données (RGPD).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The charter advises users not to send sensitive documents or personal data to externally hosted SIAG tools and to check confidentiality policies and GDPR compliance.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Fraude et Plagiat : Présenter des contenus générés par SIAG comme sa propre production est interdit. L’utilisation de l’IA pour paraphraser des contenus d’autrui est considéré comme une forme de plagiat, dans la mesure où elle rend complexe l’identification de toute production originale et représente une forme de dissimulation.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The charter prohibits presenting SIAG-generated content as one's own and treats AI paraphrasing of others' content as a form of plagiarism.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte des bonnes pratiques d'utilisation des intelligences artificielles génératives dans les travaux pédagogiques
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Le personnel enseignant ne peut pas obliger les étudiants à utiliser des SIAG nécessitant des données personnelles pour se connecter ou s'inscrire, ou entraînant des coûts dans le cadre de leur formation. Les enseignants doivent spécifier les consignes d’utilisation des SIAG dans leurs cours.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Teachers cannot require SIAG tools needing personal data or payment, and should specify SIAG-use instructions in their courses.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow source-status claim based on the official EDSMRE page and charter context.
Approved because the charter directly states disclosure expectations for SIAG use in academic work.
Approved because the charter directly discusses sensitive documents, personal data, confidentiality policies, and GDPR.
Approved because the charter directly labels presenting SIAG-generated content as one's own as prohibited and discusses AI paraphrase as plagiarism.
Approved because the charter directly scopes teacher instructions, assessment integration, and no required paid/personal-data SIAG use.

artifacts.title: Universite de Lille AI policy staged crawl draft
artifacts.summary: This staged crawl found an official Universite de Lille 2025 charter for good practices using generative AI systems in pedagogical work, plus an official page describing and linking the charter. The approved candidate claims cover source status, AI-use transparency, data protection, plagiarism/academic integrity, and teaching integration. Generic home-page and research-profile results were rejected as insufficient policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Firecrawl search found the official charter PDF and an official page about it; no separate official AI-plagiarism page was found in the searched official domain results.
The charter is framed around pedagogical work and SIAG usage; this staged bundle does not infer procurement, research, or university IT-security policy beyond the cited text.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
